user_query: I'm curious about the teachings of the Quran and the positions of celestial bodies.

TaskList.description: Fetch the entire Surah/Chapter 114 of the Quran, including all its verses and additional information.
Retrieve the positions of all celestial bodies on December 20, 2017, at latitude 33.775867 and longitude -84.39733.
Search for the keyword 'muhammad' in the Quran and provide the total matches in JSON format.
